/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIOR JUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/X: DEFENDANTAPPEARING TELEPHONICALLY,/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 05-15-95 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEAS TO COUNT I,A VIOLATION OF HS SECTION 11352, ENTERED ON 04-13-95 IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEAS TO COUNT II,A VIOLATION OF HS SECTION 11351,5, ENTERED ON 04-13-95 IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTYIS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 3, A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,//IRRC/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANG: 3/NUNCDAT: 04-13-95/DISM3/NUNCDAT: 04-13-95/X:PARTIES WAIVE PSR,/AJW/CH3:ISS:PROB 1 D:PJ1D/CTS:1/X: THE COURT DEEMS COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE SERVED IN FULL,/DNACOMP/WEAP/CTORD: ALL FINES AND FEESARE WAIVED/OBEY/ACCEP/NUNCDAT: 05-15-95/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
